title: Crisp Venezuelan Fritters
description: A delicious and crispy snack made with Venezuelan fritters and topped with garlic.
instructions: Heat 1/2 inch of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add the Venezuelan fritters and cook until golden brown.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate.
In the same skillet, add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the shredded crisp to the skillet and stir to combine with the garlic.
Serve the crisp mixture on top of the Venezuelan fritters.
